Name: Æthertech
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's ATK <@ba.vup>+8.0%</>. 
After the wearer applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</>, the wearer gains <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> <@ba.vup>+8.0%</> for 15s. This effect can reach 4 stacks. If the target already has 4 stack(s) of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</>, the wearer gains an additional Physical DMG <@ba.vup>+16.0%</> for 10s. This effect cannot stack.
